title: Tender Irish Semolina Hash
description: A gluten-free twist on a classic breakfast dish. This tender Irish semolina hash is perfect for a hearty breakfast.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
2. Add the Irish semolina and cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the hash and tender, cook for a further 2-3 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and rimacinata.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the semolina mixture in the pan.
6. Cook until the egg is almost set.
7. Add the tangy and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
